welcome.title: Welcome to AI Interview Architect
welcome.description: This quick tour walks through the core workflow on each page: question bank, assessments, new interviews, and team access.

complete.title: You're all set
complete.description: Start with New Interview when you're ready. You can replay this tour anytime from the header.

dashboardHero.title: Your command center
dashboardHero.description: The dashboard shows active interviews, pipeline health, and what needs attention today.

questionsPage.title: Question bank
questionsPage.description: Build and organize questions here. You'll reuse them whenever you create a new interview.

assessmentsPage.title: Review assessments
assessmentsPage.description: After candidates finish, open Assessments to review scores, transcripts, and AI evaluation.

newInterviewPage.title: Create an interview
newInterviewPage.description: Pick a candidate, attach questions from the bank, and send the interview link in a few clicks.

teamPage.title: Team access
teamPage.description: Manage who can create interviews, review assessments, and configure the workspace.
